networking_cloud.question: Why is networking important in cloud computing?
What is a Virtual Private Cloud (VPC)?
What is a subnet?
What is the difference between a public subnet and a private subnet?
What is an Internet Gateway?
What is a NAT Gateway?
What is a route table?
What is DNS?
What is a CDN?
What is a VPN?
Explain how a request from a user reaches a cloud-hosted application.
How do VPCs improve cloud security?
Compare Internet Gateways and NAT Gateways.
How would you design networking for a three-tier cloud application?
Explain how DNS and load balancers work together.
Describe how CDN services reduce latency.
How would you securely connect an on-premises data center to a cloud environment?
Explain the purpose of private IP addresses and public IP addresses in cloud networking.
Compare VPNs and dedicated private connectivity solutions such as Direct Connect or ExpressRoute.
Explain how network segmentation improves security.
Design a secure multi-tier cloud network for a global enterprise.
How would you design cloud networking for high availability across multiple regions?
Design a hybrid networking architecture connecting multiple cloud providers with on-premises infrastructure.
Explain the trade-offs between centralized and distributed networking architectures.
How would you optimize cloud networking for both security and low latency?
Describe strategies for designing fault-tolerant cloud networking.
How would you troubleshoot intermittent connectivity issues across multiple cloud regions?
Explain how software-defined networking (SDN) changes cloud networking.
How would you secure east-west traffic within a cloud environment?
Design a cloud networking strategy balancing security, scalability, performance, and cost.
Users from Asia experience significantly higher latency than users from Europe. Explain how you would investigate and improve the network architecture.
A cloud-hosted application must securely communicate with an on-premises database. Describe your networking solution.
An organization wants all production databases to remain inaccessible from the public internet. Explain your network design.
A company experiences a distributed denial-of-service (DDoS) attack. Explain how cloud networking services can help mitigate the attack.
Your application requires communication between workloads deployed across AWS and Azure. Explain how you would design the network.
An organization expands into five new geographic regions. Describe how you would redesign the cloud network to maintain performance and availability.
An enterprise requires complete network isolation between development, testing, and production environments. Explain your design.
Your cloud application experiences intermittent DNS failures. Walk me through your troubleshooting process.
A multinational company requires secure connectivity between dozens of branch offices and multiple cloud providers. Explain your architecture.

You are the lead Cloud Engineer responsible for designing networking for a global enterprise. Explain how you would architect VPCs, subnets, routing, DNS, CDN, connectivity, security, redundancy, and global traffic management.
